description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty hammer with a robust, rectangular head featuring angular, geometric detailing and a central pointed spike on top. The head is metallic gray with a slightly industrial, futuristic design, and it appears to be constructed from solid metal. The handle is long, straight, and reinforced, predominantly dark with blue accents and a textured grip section near the base for secure handling. The base of the handle is capped with a metallic, conical end, adding to the hammer's balance and visual weight. The overall design suggests it is intended for heavy impact tasks, possibly in construction or demolition, and its size and build indicate it is meant for two-handed use. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A large, metallic, futuristic sledgehammer with a rectangular, spiked head and a long, reinforced handle featuring blue accents and a textured grip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the angular, metallic head with a central spike and the long, straight handle with blue accents.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle, highlighting the thickness and depth of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the back face of the hammer head and the handle's alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the narrow profile of the head and the handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, reinforced handle with a textured grip section, likely made of metal with rubber or plastic grip enhancements and blue accent bands.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, sledge-type hammer head with angular, geometric features and a central pointed spike on top; both striking faces are flat and robust.
